items.title:
[负面] Could have been a nice single player game...
As it...
items.summary:
Could have been a nice single player game...
As it is...gacha everywhere and for everything.
Bad rates,characters mixed with useless items (yep,as always),no gift for new account,pay or get nothing...or maybe play 28hours a day to get enough for one pull on the overpowered character banners.
No welcome 20 pulls for free...seriously?
You are not received warmly here xD
Also,got lucky on the standard banner and got a SSR...very more powerful than SR...with great skills too...
Translation is not very good and prologue is too long.
Btw...It's not 10-pulls but 5-pulls for a guaranteed "good" card...It's a thing better than most gacha at least!
When the game is going EOS...do an offline version and I'll buy It...no problem :)
Because,It's a very nice game with great characters and nice story and music and fine gameplay...

items.title: [正面] Fun gacha game. Very F2P friendly. Would redeem th...
items.summary: Fun gacha game. Very F2P friendly. Would redeem the codes found in the guide section before Aug 12 for lots of free stuff.

items.title: [负面] I couldn't focus on playing longer than reaching t...
items.summary:
I couldn't focus on playing longer than reaching the first "elite". The translations aren't great, but I can ignore it. I just felt the UI was annoying, slow and clunky. I also hate that it defaulted to windowed mode and didn't have access to a settings menu, I couldn't see the "gear" any where even though I see it in the screenshots.
The nail in the coffin for me was when I decided to quit and take a break, I had to alt f4 the game to get out.
Game play at this point in the game was equally slow and clunky, suffering from the same UI irritations.

Maybe it gets better later on. Maybe it stays the same. I guess I''ll never know.

items.title:
[正面] The Good:
The art and music are beautiful and oth...
items.summary:
The Good:
The art and music are beautiful and otherworldly! The gameplay and mechanics are well done and refined and if you like rogue-like card games and light gacha, chances are you'll love this game, too. You can EASILY find the playstyle you're looking for with essentially their 4 types of ways to play the game and just enough characters to choose from to fine tune your comp/team.

The OK:
Translations in the story itself are perfectly well done. Everywhere else like card mechanic descriptions and some menus? Not so much... It isn't unbearable, just some slight annoyances you get used to. I imagine they'll improve it later on.

The Bad:
If you plan to play this for an hour or less a day, you'll honestly be fine and never really deal with the game slowing you down or hitting a play wall. If you play more and want to sit down for several hours, expect to pay a little for the ability to do that or having some brutally hard gameplay since the difficulty progresses faster than you can.
